api: Kyriba tenant REST API v1 (https://api.kyriba.com/api/v1, tenant-overridable)
scope: Pass B review of internal/connectors/kyriba. The declarative bundle preserves the 4 legacy-parity tenant REST collection endpoints (bank-accounts, transactions, statements, payments). The public Kyriba developer portal at https://api.developer.kyriba.com/portal/environments/DEFAULT/apis exposes a catalog of 42 separate API products with distinct entrypoint bases (for example /v1/accounts, /v1/cash-balances, /v1/payment/transfers, /workcap/v2, webhook callback products), but representative product docs expose public overview/change-log pages rather than operation-level OpenAPI pages through the portal API.

excluded.reason: developer-portal catalog endpoint for discovering separate Kyriba API products, not a tenant business-data collection to sync through this connector

separate Kyriba API products with their own entrypoint bases, scopes, and operation contracts; public portal exposes overview/change-log pages but no operation-level OpenAPI page for this connector to model safely without changing it from tenant REST collection parity into a multi-product platform connector
